# Spec: generate-sbom.md §File-based hashes
# Covers: literal value, file-based, path-based with extensions filter.
# Directory hash determinism (sorted manifest).

mkdir src
mkdir src/cjson
mv hello.c src/cjson/cJSON.c
mv hello.h src/cjson/cJSON.h
mv readme.md src/cjson/README.md

exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json -o out.json

# Literal hash passes through untouched.
exec jq -e '.components[] | select(.name=="literal") | .hashes[0].content == "e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855"' out.json

# File-based hash (known SHA-256 of "hello\n" = 5891b5b522d5df086d0ff0b110fbd9d21bb4fc7163af34d08286a2e846f6be03)
exec jq -e '.components[] | select(.name=="singlefile") | .hashes[0].content == "5891b5b522d5df086d0ff0b110fbd9d21bb4fc7163af34d08286a2e846f6be03"' out.json

# Directory-based hash with extensions filter (c, h only)
exec jq -re '.components[] | select(.name=="dirhash") | .hashes[0].content | length' out.json
stdout 64

# Directory-based hash should be different if README.md is included (no ext filter)
exec jq -re '.components[] | select(.name=="dirhash-nofilter") | .hashes[0].content | length' out.json
stdout 64

# Hashes for dirhash and dirhash-nofilter should differ
exec jq -re '.components[] | select(.name=="dirhash") | .hashes[0].content' out.json
cp stdout h1.txt
exec jq -re '.components[] | select(.name=="dirhash-nofilter") | .hashes[0].content' out.json
cp stdout h2.txt
! cmp h1.txt h2.txt

# Rerun should produce byte-identical file/dir hashes (determinism)
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json -o out2.json
exec jq -re '.components[] | select(.name=="dirhash") | .hashes[0].content' out2.json
cp stdout h1b.txt
cmp h1.txt h1b.txt

-- meta.yaml --
app:
  name: app
  version: 1.0.0
  primary_purpose: application
  supplier:
    name: Acme
  license:
    id: MIT
-- .components.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "literal", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}],
      "hashes": [{"algorithm": "SHA-256", "value": "e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855"}] },
    { "name": "singlefile", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}],
      "hashes": [{"algorithm": "SHA-256", "file": "./src/cjson/cJSON.c"}] },
    { "name": "dirhash", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}],
      "hashes": [{"algorithm": "SHA-256", "path": "./src/cjson/", "extensions": ["c", "h"]}] },
    { "name": "dirhash-nofilter", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}],
      "hashes": [{"algorithm": "SHA-256", "path": "./src/cjson/"}] }
  ]
}
-- hello.c --
hello
-- hello.h --
#pragma once
-- readme.md --
this is the readme
